title: Geographic Health: Cloud Provider Summary
description: Summarizes instance health by cloud provider (OCI, Azure, AWS, GCP) showing total instances, healthy/degraded/unreachable counts, and provider-level fleet distribution.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Multicloud Health Logs' | stats count as heartbeats, unique('Host Name') as total_instances, unique('Region') as regions by 'Cloud Provider', 'Status' | sort 'Cloud Provider', 'Status'

ask_ai_prompts: Compare provider-level health and identify which cloud has the highest concentration of degraded capacity.
Explain whether the provider distribution reflects a regional incident or a fleet-wide problem.
